title: Wiring Pattern v1
description: Declarative wiring pattern for AI-chat and tooling: how to query constellation state and emit files + DB inserts in a single, deterministic step.

patternId.description: Stable, unique identifier for this wiring pattern, e.g., add-region-v1.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this pattern does.

dbQueries.description: SQL queries that must be executed before rendering outputs.

queryId.description: Short identifier used to reference this query's results in templates.

sql.description: Parameterized SQL string compatible with the constellation DB.

bindParams.description: Template expressions for bound parameters, evaluated at runtime.

expectRows.description: Expected cardinality of the result set.

requiredFields.description: Goal fields the AI-chat request must provide before this pattern can be applied.

files.description: File artifacts to emit in target repositories.

repoId.description: Target repo identifier, typically from a prior query (e.g. constellation VM node).

path.description: Repository-relative path where the file will be written.

templateRef.description: Logical name for the content template to apply.

schemaId.description: Canonical schema id or filename that the emitted file must conform to.

tier.description: Optional tier label for the new file.

dbInserts.description: Database insert operations that must be performed alongside file writes.

table.description: Target table name in the constellation or engine DB.

rowTemplate.description: Template for the row to insert; values are template expressions evaluated at runtime.

expectReturning.description: Logical names for fields that may be returned from this insert (e.g., auto-increment ids).

dependsOn.description: Names of previous inserts this row depends on, for template references.
